source_text: Authenticate all agent actions with short-lived credentials.
target_text: Agent identity spoofing: adversary impersonates the agent to downstream tools.

source_text: Log all prompts and model outputs with tamper-evident storage.
target_text: LLM Prompt Injection: adversary crafts input that bypasses model safeguards.

source_text: Monitor for emergent risks and incidents across the AI lifecycle.
Maintain an inventory of training datasets with provenance metadata.
target_text: Data supply-chain integrity controls for model training.

source_text: General-purpose AI providers shall disclose a summary of training data.
target_text: Training data documentation and disclosure controls.
